creator: todd@toddblum.org
text:
The racoon daemon SEGV'd and core dumped unexpectedly.  Racoon did not auto-restart, causing total loss of IPSec functionality.  Log excerpt follows.  Core dump available at http://dl.dropbox.com/u/28649993/misc-scripts/racoon.core .

May  9 02:00:41 192.168.xxx.xxx pf:     192.168.xx.xxx.80 > 192.168.yyy.y.33150: Flags [.], cksum 0xf662 (correct), ack 1, win 0, length 0
May  9 02:00:43 192.168.xxx.xxx pf: 00:00:02.457036 rule 1/0(match): block in on vr1: (tos 0x0, ttl 1, id 3439, offset 0, flags [none], proto
 OSPF (89), length 76)
May  9 02:00:43 192.168.xxx.xxx pf:     pub.lic.xx.xx > 224.0.0.5: OSPFv2, Hello, length 56 [len 44]
May  9 02:00:43 192.168.xxx.xxx pf: #011Router-ID pub.lic.xxx.x, Backbone Area, Authentication Type: none (0)
May  9 02:00:43 192.168.xxx.xxx pf: #011Options [External, LLS]
May  9 02:00:43 192.168.xxx.xxx pf: #011  Hello Timer 10s, Dead Timer 40s, Mask 255.255.255.224, Priority 1
May  9 02:00:43 192.168.xxx.xxx pf: #011  Designated Router pub.lic.yy.yy
May  9 02:00:43 192.168.xxx.xxx pf: #011  LLS: checksum: 0xfff6, length: 3
May  9 02:00:43 192.168.xxx.xxx pf: #011    Extended Options (1), length: 4
May  9 02:00:43 192.168.xxx.xxx pf: #011      Options: 0x00000001 [LSDB resync]
May  9 02:00:43 192.168.xxx.xxx racoon: NOTIFY: the packet is retransmitted by pub.lic.zzz.zz[500] (1).
May  9 02:00:48 192.168.xxx.xxx pf: 00:00:05.206751 rule 1/0(match): block in on enc0: (tos 0x0, ttl 99, id 236, offset 0, flags [none], proto TCP (6), length 40)
May  9 02:00:48 192.168.xxx.xxx pf:     192.168.xx.xxx.80 > 192.168.yyy.yyy.41609: Flags [.], cksum 0x437b (correct), ack 1, win 0, length 0
May  9 02:00:48 192.168.xxx.xxx kernel: pid 32526 (racoon), uid 0: exited on signal 11 (core dumped)

How-To-Repeat: Unknown
